bearerAuth.description: Your AnyAPI key as a Bearer token.

info.description: Any API, one wallet, USD, no subscriptions. Each API is a single POST to /v1/run/{sku}: send the normalized input, get a normalized result. You are charged the winning provider's price in real dollars only on success; failed calls are never charged.
info.title: AnyAPI

post.description: Fetch a single Facebook post by URL with its text and engagement counts (likes, comments, shares, views), normalized across providers.

400.description: Input did not match the schema (no charge).

post.description: List the comments on a Facebook post by URL with cursor pagination (text, author, reactions, reply count), normalized across providers.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's nextCursor.

feedbackId.description: Facebook feedback id for the post (alternative to url).

400.description: Input did not match the schema (no charge).
